parts.purpose: Keeps the visible label, description, semantic listbox, form controls, and persistent recovery state together.
Provides the persistent visible and programmatic listbox name.
Groups options under one visible section heading without changing global key identity.
Exposes direct managed focus, selection, disabled state, typeahead text, position, and set size.
Adds a non-color selected cue while aria-selected remains authoritative.
Keeps bounded selected option text in the accessibility tree when selected rows are outside a virtual window.
Provides an explicit keyboard, touch, speech, and switch pagination action.
